stemHtml: In an unsaturated layer in the friction layer the air is well mixed by turbulence. The layer remains unsaturated. After some time the vertical temperature profile will:

options.a: at first coincide with the average dry adiabat and then coincide with the average saturated adiabat.
options.b: coincide with the average saturated adiabat in the layer.
options.c: correspond to the dry adiabatic lapse rate.
options.d: always change toward a more stable position.
